summary: The diff implements most requirements successfully. REQ-5, REQ-6, REQ-7, and REQ-9 are fully implemented with the new Product Management page, stock adjustment controls, CRUD operations, and navigation links. REQ-8 (Orders Dashboard) appears partially implemented—an AdminOrders page exists and displays order information, but the diff is truncated, making it difficult to verify all acceptance criteria (particularly timestamp sorting and all customer shipping details display).

missing_requirements.requirement: Orders are sorted by most recent first
missing_requirements.reason: While AdminOrders.tsx contains a comment indicating orders are sorted by timestamp using order ID as proxy, the actual sorting implementation is visible but relies on string comparison of IDs rather than numeric timestamp field. The diff shows 'sortedOrders.sort((a, b) => b.id.localeCompare(a.id))' but acceptance criteria specifies sorting by timestamp field.
